Puss in Boots (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $149,260,504Details
International Box Office $405,726,973
Worldwide Box Office $554,987,477
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $50,114,759
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $22,163,869
Total $72,278,628
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Long before he even met Shrek, the notorious fighter, lover and outlaw Puss in Boots becomes a hero when he sets off on an adventure with the tough and street smart Kitty Softpaws and the mastermind Humpty Dumpty to save his town. Complicating matters along the way are the notorious outlaws Jack and Jill, who will do anything to see that Puss and his band do not succeed. This is the true story of The Cat, The Myth, The Legend...and, of course, The Boots.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$34,077,439 (22.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,952 opening theaters/3,963 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $225,094,185

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 28th, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
October 28th, 2011 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 25th, 2011 (Wide) (Spain)
December 1st, 2011 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
December 1st, 2011 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
December 7th, 2011 (Wide) (Belgium)
December 8th, 2011 (Wide) (Argentina)
Video Release: February 24th, 2012 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: PG for some adventures, action and mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2188, 9/7/2011)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Franchise: Shrek, Puss in Boots
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Directing Yourself, Prequel, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run, Life on the Outside, Non-Chronological, Orphan, Revenge, Surprise Twist, Swashbuckler, Talking Animals, Treasure Hunters
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, DreamWorks Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Long before he even met Shrek, the notorious fighter, lover and outlaw Puss in Boots becomes a hero when he sets off on an adventure with the tough and street smart Kitty Softpaws and the mastermind Humpty Dumpty to save his town. Complicating matters along the way are the notorious outlaws Jack and Jill, who will do anything to see that Puss and his band do not succeed. This is the true story of The Cat, The Myth, The Legend...and, of course, The Boots.
